expected.notes: User has foreign accounts but is_nra derives to yes (nonresident status), breaking the second condition (is_nra neq yes), so rule does not fire.

probe_intent:
Generate a synthetic case where the engine must NOT fire rule 'foreign_accounts_fbar_risk', but that structurally resembles a case that WOULD fire it. Produce a case where ONE of the rule's conditions is deliberately not satisfied while the others are. Rule conditions:
  - answers.has_foreign_accounts eq yes
  - answers.is_nra neq yes
No real PII or real-looking government identifiers.
